text:
There once was a tiny frog who lived at the bottom of a big, reflective crystal pebble pond.

She loved to watch her reflection swim around all day. One day, while admiring herself one time too many, she spotted something shiny drifting down from the bank.

It was a tiny shining starfish! The frog loved starfish; she thought they were the cutest things.

Every day after that, the frog would go looking for the starfish. But she never found it. After weeks of searching, she decided it was just luck.

One day while searching at the same spot, she heard a giggle. She looked down to see a couple of tiny chipmunks playing. They caught an orb spider every time they snuggled into their cushion of leaves.

That evening, the frog made a tiny cushion of leaves too. Every night she hid there, thinking the starfish would find it.

One night the chipmunks noticed the little green thing floating there. They wanted some
